CustomField.description: The First Escalation Date determines when the initial escalation is applied to the MR. If this date is populated, priority is given to it over the month setting. For example, if the month is set to January but the First Escalation Date is set to November 15, the escalation will occur in November. This applies to all types of escalations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The First Escalation Date determines when the initial escalation is applied to the MR. If this date is populated, priority is given to it over the month setting. For example, if the month is set to January but the First Escalation Date is set to November 15, the escalation will occur in November. This applies to all types of escalations.
CustomField.label: First Escalation Date
